indicators.name: large potted plant
indicators.rationale: The large potted plant obstructs the view of the ceiling and walls, creating a sense of confinement and reducing the feeling of openness and spaciousness.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene has a large potted plant that obstructs the view of the ceiling and walls, creating a sense of confinement and reducing the feeling of openness and spaciousness. This makes the space less suitable for sleep (primary).
